summary: OBE — verified via grep that current data/wins.json WIN-062 / WIN-058 / WIN-058b detail_evidence anchors to #timestamp-error are now `onclick="showTab('timestamp')"` without `;return false`. The fix the ISS asked for has already been applied in a prior commit. The parallel SEC-5.0 anchor (still had `;return false`) is being addressed by PATCH-302-A in EXP-302. Recommend close-as-resolved-already.
